name: Soufle Vanilias (Vanilla Souffle)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Slowly add flour and blend with a wooden spoon.
3. Mix sugar with milk in a pot and heat until scalded but not boiling.
4. Remove from heat and gradually pour into the flour mixture; stir quickly to form a thick cream (return to heat briefly if needed).
5. Partially cool the mixture.
6. Beat egg yolks with vanilla until very thick.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
8. Add yolks to the cream mixture and stir well.
9. Fold in beaten whites.
10. Pour into a buttered glass baking dish or 6-8 individual buttered remekins.
11. Bake immediately in a preheated 300°F oven for about 20 minutes.
12. Serve hot, sprinkled with powdered sugar.
Variation: Omit vanilla and replace with 1 tablespoon grated orange or tangerine peel.
